# [CL-02] K3 epistemic surface + refusal-under-UNKNOWN demo

> Plan ID `CL-02` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done on γ-surface.** [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) Demo 2
chains `redteam_filter → k3_alu → datalog/asp/sat → restraint_ctrl`.
The K3 path refuses when the value is `UNKNOWN` rather than producing
a confident class.

## Evidence in this repo

- Demo: [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) §Demo 2
- RTL: `src/redteam_filter.v`, `src/k3_alu.v`,
  `src/datalog_engine_mini.v`, `src/asp_solver_mini.v`,
  `src/sat_solver_mini.v`, `src/restraint_ctrl.v`
- Coverage: `test/k3_alu_tb.v` — last run reported 27/27 cases PASS.
- Refusal: `test/restraint_ctrl_tb.v` — last run reported ALL PASS,
  CLARA Gap-4 OK.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] K3 truth-table coverage (TRUE / UNKNOWN / FALSE) exercised end-
      to-end.
- [x] Refusal observed when K3 result is UNKNOWN
      (`test/restraint_ctrl_tb.v`).
- [x] Red-team filter flags ≥ 1 distinct adversarial pattern
      (`test/redteam_filter_tb.v` — 18/18 PASS at last run).
- [ ] Falsification rule documented in BENCHMARKS.md (already there;
      keep it sync'd with any change in restraint policy).

## R5 honesty

No silicon-side measurement claimed — demo is **simulation-only**
until the SILICON gate moves in [`STATUS.md`](../../STATUS.md).
